fields.summary: Performance | Creating a blank report in 26.04 takes 80% longer than in 26.03 (9s vs. 5s for Platform Analytics Project)

content.text: new report → choose Platform Analytics Project, it takes around 9s (no matter first or 2nd run)
then swtich to aqdt library server, new report → choose Platform Analytics Project, it takes around 5s
for 26.04, it would take 80% longer  than in 26.03 release
this is the performance issue for embedding report edtior.
New pull request created by kawang_mstr for m2021:
Pull request merged into m2021 by shliu_mstr:
Pr merged, please help to verify the performance again.  I minimized the performance degradation of loading native script of the workstation.
Generally, it will slow down by fetching script/css from server. Ideally, the performance should be similar to Dashboard. Let’s have another round of testing to see what should be done next.

Retest on workstation against build 11.6.0400.00711. The time cost for new report is similiar as new dashboard with feature flag on. Both taking about 12s. And when feature flag is off, it would take ~6s. Considering the degradation is expected after swtiching to embedding workflow and the 50% longer is acceptable -  compared with new dashboard workflow.  Close this defect as Fixed.
